case_title: KIM, GREG VS MUI, GRANT YEE

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KIM, GREG IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MUI, GRANT YEE PLAINTIFF IS NOT THE REGISTERED OWNER OF THE SUBJECT VEHICLE AND IS THEREFORE DISQUALIFIED FOR RECOVERING FOR ITS PROPERTY DAMAGE. CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT MUI, GRANT YEE RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT KIM, GREG $1,044.16 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,066.16, DEFENDANT WAIVES NO SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
DEFT EXHBITS RETURNED. AUTHORIZATION LETTER FILED.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $951.12 FILED BY KIM, GREG AS TO DEFENDANT MUI, GRANT YEE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-05-2004 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO DEC-03-2004 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF NOV-05-2004 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PLAINTIFF SIGNED A DECLARATION DEFENDANT NOT SERVED, ALSO FILED A NEW ADDRESS FOR DEFENDANT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MUI, GRANT YEE
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,044.16 FILED BY MUI, GRANT YEE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT KIM, GREG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-03-2004 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
